nodes.name: Daily at 7am
nodes.notes: Fires every day at 7:00 AM server time. Adjust cron expression to match your timezone.

parameters.text: ⚠️ *Daily News Brief skipped* — orchestrator is not responding. Check VPS at 72.60.209.109.

nodes.name: Run News Brief Crew
nodes.notes: Timeout set to 5 minutes. News brief crew runs: Planner → Researcher → Copywriter → QA → Voice.

nodes.name: Send to Telegram
nodes.notes: Sends each chunk as a separate message to respect Telegram's 4096 char limit.

parameters.text:
❌ *Daily News Brief failed*

Error: `={{ $json.error_message }}`

Check orchestrator logs: `ssh root@72.60.209.109` → `docker logs orc-crewai --tail 50`

meta.notes:
SETUP REQUIRED:
1. Set TELEGRAM_CHAT_ID env variable in n8n (your personal Telegram chat ID — get it from @userinfobot)
2. Configure 'agentsHQ Telegram Bot' credential with your bot token from TELEGRAM_BOT_TOKEN
3. Adjust cron time (default: 7am server time). Server is UTC — adjust for your timezone.
4. Test manually: activate workflow, click 'Test workflow' button in n8n
5. Optional: change topics in 'Build News Brief Task' node to customize the daily brief

FLOW:
Schedule (7am) → Health Check → Build Task → Run Crew (5min timeout) → Split into chunks → Telegram

ERROR HANDLING:
- Orchestrator down: sends alert to Telegram immediately
- Crew failure: sends error with debug command to Telegram
- Message too long: auto-splits on section boundaries (---)
